summary: Comprehensive testing of ExportAssist app completed. All backend APIs (22/22 tests) pass. Full E2E frontend flow tested successfully including signup, profile creation, shipment creation with new logistics fields, and PDF generation. Fixed a critical PDF generation bug (KeepTogether layout error).

issues: Value column header shows '₹' but displays USD values - minor inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PDF generation was failing due to KeepTogether causing LayoutError in footer table. Changed to nested table approach in server.py line 591-620.

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing

seed_data_creation: Test users and shipments created during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Auth (signup/login), Company Profile CRUD, Shipment CRUD with new logistics fields (port_of_loading, port_of_discharge, incoterms, total_packages, package_type), PDF generation (Commercial Invoice and Packing List), Tally XML export, GSTR-1 CSV export. Pro features (Packing List, Tally XML, GSTR-1) are gated behind is_pro_member flag.
